title: Kwartz Reword 16x
description: Fiery red demon PvP pack avec clean short swords, crisp particles, custom sky, refined GUI, high-FPS performance et immersive sound pack pour Bedwars, Skywars et duels rapides.
body:
Plunge into a fiery **red demon** PvP experience built on a **clean**, **polished** Default+ base.This pack delivers **smooth short swords**, **crisp particles**, a beautiful **custom sky**, and **high-FPS** performance for clutch plays.
Perfect for Bedwars, Skywars, Duels, and any fast-paced PvP fight.
 
# 🔥 Main Features
## • Custom Sky

![Custom sky 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e89cf405c7d57310f384bdab74c5c6d5ce9486d6.png)

## • Clean Short Swords

![Short Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d6d2e0dde93727b792fc9944869f3e17aedc60a.png)

## • Clean Armors

![Amor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50bed4e628a1cc6348b7bc8c4ab9a18ae21cbc0c.png)

## • Sharp & Clear Particles
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0ecUcmVr3pI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## • Refined GUI & Hotbar

![Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2866d5ec35740c033774a1ed594d08f751c3674.png)

## • Default+ Visual Identity

Clean, readable textures designed for competitive PvP.

## • Custom Sound Pack

Enhanced sounds to elevate every hit, swing, and environmental effect. (Made by someone i don't remember is name sry...)

# ⚔️ Why This Pack?

- Clean visual clarity for PvP

- Strong red demon aesthetic

- Smooth animations & reduced clutter

- Perfect for competitive game modes
 
# 🔧 Performance

Light 16x pack, designed to stay smooth on all setups.

# 🚀 Upcoming Updates

More color variants are coming soon, plus a complete update for Minecraft 1.21.
